name: Late Night Urban Legend
description:
MISS BEAST

Miss Beast is shown to have a slender body with long legs. Miss Beast has paper-white skin and long white hair that reaches her ankles, with bangs that cover the tops of her eyes. The underside of her hair is a medium-dark blue, with ghostly white eyes and a slanted black pupil that looks all around (also, on the top there is a white fade). Her hair has a blue outline, and the tops of her eyes are hidden among the strands of hair. On the sides of her face, two long, joined strands hang gently. Her eyes have two small, slanted pupils and two eyelashes on top, with one eyelash on the bottom. Underneath her outfit, Miss Beast wears a black shirt with red stripes on the abdomen that appear to be slanted inward, accompanied by pants of the same color, and equally black, pointy boots. Over the black shirt, she appears to be wearing a long-sleeved T-shirt with puffed wrist cuffs, a lighter color than the shirt. The pants on each side have a red line that ends at the heel, and they also appear to have black knee pads over the aforementioned attire, Miss Beast wears a gray trench coat with a high collar (but not long enough to completely cover her neck) and ankle-length, split in half from the abdomen to the waist, and sleeveless (which, on top, makes it look like a poncho). On the collar of the trench coat, there are small but thick red lines on the sides near the front. She has a name tag on the left side of her trench coat. The bottom of the trench coat has pockets with a red outline, as does the opening of her trench coat. She also wears a black belt with a gray buckle around her waist (over the trench coat). Finally, she wears gray fingerless gloves.

MR. BARREL/DANIEL F. BARREL

Mister Barrel has long white puffy hair with a ponytail which stretches down to the ground, fitted with two diamond shaped horns on top of his head. He typically wears a white peaked cap with a dark brim, labeled with the Paranormal Purge Foundation acronym at the front of the hat. He wears a monitor covering his left eye with numerous functions, typically emoticons to represent his current emotion. His outfit is fitted with a white shirt with pockets, a long black tie attached to the neckline, a nametag on the left side of his shirt, and a large black jacket which hangs from his elbows. Black spikes appear behind his shoulders, large bat wings sprawl from his back and his left hand is replaced with interchangeable weapons. His appearance is finished with black pantaboots, which is held tightly by his belt around his waist.

MS. PAVLOVA

Miss Pavlova has a slender figure, long legs, and lightly tanned white skin. She has shoulder-length peach hair, with a lightning bolt-shaped underside and a pumpkin-colored fade. Her hair is a thick, spiky ahoge on the right side, is swirled in shape. A strand on each side of her face falls gently to her shoulders. Her eyes are black, with white pupils. Miss Pavlova's outfit is a white trench coat with a turtleneck with with blue window-pane patterns, a sky-blue checkered collar, and puffed cuffs. Around her waist is a black belt without a buckle . On the turtleneck is a small sky-blue square. On the sides of the trench coat, there are small black rectangles(which are likely pockets). On the chest, there are open lines surrounding that area, and on the back, a light purple outline. She wears white pants, with pointy white boots, and a sky-blue split-circle design with a darker blue (cyan) outline. Around her right arm is a black band with the "PPF" emblem. Finally, she wears gray gloves. Behind her is a large claymore, which as claimed by ENI is as long as here and heavier than her. When not in use, it is encased in a dark grey bag with teal markings. However, the actual claymore is teal in colour, and perhaps reflective.

MR. HOTCHKISS/MARSHAL HOTCHKISS

Marshall retains his regular clothes though his tie is now red and he doesn't have staples for buttons. His hair is scarlet red and his horns are no longer til
creator: The Dr1fter
